ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data record */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for the instrument on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on that date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on that date */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, commodity) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., equity, bond) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "instrument_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector categorization of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader) */,
  "trader_status" TEXT /* Status of the trader (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "trader_experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the trader (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader involved in the session */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trading session */,
  "session_volume" REAL /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "session_profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss made during the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who placed the order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument for the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "order_volume" REAL /* Volume of the order */,
  "order_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade order (e.g., pending, executed) */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the trade order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade execution */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade order that was executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time of when the trade was executed */,
  "execution_volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade executed */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "execution_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for executing the trade */,
  "execution_commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the trader or broker for the trade execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_executions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES trade_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executed trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES trade_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the report generation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument analyzed */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis conducted */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who created the report */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "analysis_rating" REAL /* Rating or score given to the financial instrument based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the analyst (e.g., commodities, equities) */,
  "analyst_experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the analyst (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  "analyst_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the analyst (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the report submission */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the trader or analyst who submitted the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of regulatory report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., submitted, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_reports_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
